_comment: Tunable thresholds and weights for the Atlas quantitative regime model (v1). Edit to adjust classification sensitivity without changing code.

trend_thresholds._comment: SPY relative to its 200-day moving average drives the primary trend signal.

risk_thresholds._comment: VIX levels define fear regimes; term-ratio detects term-structure inversion (VIX/VIX3M).

credit_thresholds._comment: Investment-grade credit OAS (BAMLC0A0CM, percentage points). Rising OAS signals stress.

yield_curve_thresholds._comment: Spread = long-maturity yield minus short-maturity yield (percentage points). Negative = inverted.

dollar_thresholds._comment: DXY index level. Strong dollar can signal global risk-off; weak dollar often risk-on for commodities.

commodity_thresholds._comment: Gold/Copper ratio: high ratio = risk-off (gold outperforming copper); low = risk-on.

weights._comment: Dimension weights used by the scoring model. Must sum to 1.0.
